repos.author: NousResearch
repos.name: hermes-agent
repos.description: The agent that grows with you
repos.summary: An AI agent framework from NousResearch focused on continuous learning and adaptation. Designed to evolve its capabilities over time as it interacts with users and environments.

repos.author: forrestchang
repos.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
repos.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
repos.summary: A curated CLAUDE.md prompt file distilled from Andrej Karpathy's insights on common LLM coding mistakes. Helps Claude Code avoid typical pitfalls in AI-assisted software development.

repos.author: HKUDS
repos.name: DeepTutor
repos.summary: An AI-powered personalized learning assistant built as an agent-native system. Uses deep learning to adapt tutoring content to individual learner needs and pace.

repos.author: OpenBMB
repos.name: VoxCPM
repos.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
repos.summary: VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free text-to-speech system supporting multilingual speech generation, creative voice design, and realistic voice cloning. A significant upgrade over the original VoxCPM.

repos.author: opendataloader-project
repos.name: opendataloader-pdf
repos.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
repos.summary: An open-source PDF parsing tool designed to extract structured data from PDFs for AI training pipelines. Automates PDF accessibility and preprocessing for machine learning datasets.

repos.author: obra
repos.name: superpowers
repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
repos.summary: An agentic framework for organizing and executing skills in software development. Provides a methodology for building reliable AI-assisted development workflows using shell-based tooling.

repos.author: TheCraigHewitt
repos.name: seomachine
repos.description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
repos.summary: A Claude Code-powered system for generating SEO-optimized blog content. Handles research, writing, analysis, and ranking optimization end-to-end for any niche or business.

repos.author: coleam00
repos.name: Archon
repos.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.
repos.summary: An open-source harness framework for AI coding agents that adds determinism and repeatability. Lets teams capture, replay, and validate AI coding sessions for consistent outcomes.

repos.author: shiyu-coder
repos.name: Kronos
repos.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
repos.summary: A foundation model trained on financial market language — covering SEC filings, earnings calls, analyst reports, and market news. Built for financial NLP tasks like sentiment analysis, prediction, and document understanding.

repos.author: YishenTu
repos.name: claudian
repos.description: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault
repos.summary: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator directly within your note vault. Enables context-aware AI assistance while writing and organizing personal knowledge.
